results.title: Amazon (AMZN) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
Amazon (AMZN) Q1 2026 Earnings: Date, Expectations, Results Outlook & Key Watchpoints

summary: Q1 2026 reported April 29, 2026: EPS $2.78 (beat est. $1.63), revenue $181.5B. Next earnings (Q2 2026) unconfirmed but expected ~July 30, 2026 after market close. No Q2 EPS/revenue estimates found in this search.
